subtasks.description: Fetch Adobe license agreements and current license inventory from MongoDB (contract details, license counts, terms, renewal dates)
Query Snowflake for Q4 Adobe usage metrics (seats used, actual consumption, spending)
Reconcile MongoDB license data with Snowflake Q4 usage; identify gaps, overages, and underutilization; classify renewal posture; generate summary report for #sam-team
Post reconciliation summary to #sam-team Slack channel

plan.cost_rationale: 4 subtasks (vs 5-6): mongo_query and sql_gen run in parallel for independent data fetches (2 calls), cross_recon merges results with reconciliation logic and generates actionable summary (1 call), multitool_plan handles Slack posting (1 call). No policy_action needed—reconciliation and posture classification are core cross_recon responsibilities, not separate governance evaluation. Tier assignment: small for mongo_query and sql_gen (straightforward single-source queries), mid for cross_recon (multi-source reconciliation + classification logic), small for multitool_plan (simple Slack post via registry). Within 6-tool budget: 2 parallel data fetches + 1 reconciliation + 1 Slack post = 4 tool invocations core; multitool_plan may invoke 1-2 additional registry tools for Slack delivery (total ≤ 6).

output.sql: SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, SUM(daily_active_seats) as total_seats_used, SUM(amount_usd) as total_spending, COUNT(DISTINCT event_id) as consumption_events, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'consumption' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) as actual_consumption FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND fiscal_quarter = 4 GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY total_spending DESC

arguments.message:
📊 **License Reconciliation Summary - Adobe Portfolio**

**1. Creative Cloud All Apps**
   • Status: HOLD
   • Licensed Seats: 500 | Used: 412 | Utilization: 82.4%
   • Unused Seats: 88 (minor right-sizing opportunity)
   • Annual Contract Value: $360,000
   • Recommendation: Monitor Q1 before reducing
   • Renewal Posture: Renew with Optimization

**2. Acrobat DC Pro** ⚠️ CRITICAL
   • Status: REDUCE
   • Licensed Seats: 300 | Used: 89 | Utilization: 29.7%
   • Unused Seats: 211 (~$38,124 annualized waste)
   • Annual Contract Value: $54,000
   • Recommendation: Reduce to 100-120 seats at renewal
   • Renewal Posture: Reduce Aggressively

**3. Marketo Engage**
   • Status: EXPAND
   • Licensed Seats: 50 | Used: 53 | Utilization: 106.0%
   • Overage: 3 seats over capacity
   • Annual Contract Value: $120,000
   • Recommendation: Add seats to accommodate demand
   • Renewal Posture: Expand

**Summary**: Portfolio requires optimization across Adobe products. Priority actions: (1) Reduce Acrobat DC Pro seats, (2) Expand Marketo Engage capacity, (3) Monitor Creative Cloud utilization.
